programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Alex and Wally bet to see who can date Julie Artie hopes to date starlet Mona Doug and his parents little people sail together and he runs into Beth from home Hes attracted to her but little people make her uncomfortable

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Freeways got a new girlfriend and when her master is killed Freeway disappears with the gun -- but doesnt have it when he gets home

programme.title: Cagney and Lacey
programme.desc: Getting shot doesnt stop Chris from assisting on a case while in recovery while Mary Beths temporary replacement partner leaves a lot to be desired

programme.title: The Fastest Gun Alive
programme.desc: In the western frontier town of Cross Creek storekeeper George Temple is a polite and soft spoken man with a secret past When 3 bank robbers on the lam stop in town to change horses Georges past comes back to haunt him

programme.title: Public Cowboy Number 1
programme.desc: Rustlers using modern technology airplanes shortwave radios refrigerated trucks are Genes target

programme.desc: Addams Family 121

programme.title: Addams 225
programme.desc: Addams 225

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Amos invites their old neighbors to California for a visit including Lukes old girlfriend Elvira Kate tries to hide her jealousy during the reminiscing of old times

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When some of Little Lukes classmates tease and bully him about his hillbilly roots Grandpa steps in to teach them about the perniciousness of prejudice

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Predatory electronics salesman Jack Rhodes uses a video dating service to pick up lonely young women for one-night stands but meets his match in cunning enticing Barbara who invites Jack on a date to her high-rise apartment loft

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Taking a job with the railroad Eric meets and befriends a former prize fighter who was a childhood idol of his who is on the run from the mob after he refused to throw a fight But a bar-room brawl draws the mobs attention to the man

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Knight 313
programme.desc: Knight 313

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A woman is driven to murder when her newborns cursed cradle seeks revenge

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Phil Melissa Mitch Mary and Vinnie are high school friends who unwittingly raise the dead on Halloween night Once the dead have returned Pitchford Cove will never be the same againor will it

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Doug and Roxanne move to Springwood but while Dougs at work Roxanne begins to unpack and discovers that a mix-up with the movers has left their house filled with someone elses possessions -- in the boxes she finds bloody knives and shredded dresses Meanwhile Emily discovers a stack of 19th century love letters hidden behind a panel in her new home and she begins to envision the relationships of the authors

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS is going to stop Smart from testifying against one of their agents

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max must hold a séance to get information from a dead informer

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ is tricked into returning to Orly County where hes quickly arrested and imprisoned by the unscrupulous Sheriff Lobo BJ and his fellow falsely accused prisoners plot a jailbreak and a mad dash for the county line

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Marital strife boils over in both the Post and Addison households and Mister Ed goes to work as an extra in a western movie

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed attempts to torpedo Wilburs plans to have him march in the Pagent Parade

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan concocts a Kommandant of the Year award to distract Klink so a new Nazi rocket being stored protectively at Stalag 13 can be sabotaged

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan must reverse course when efforts to make Klink look competent before the Nazi Inspector General get the Kommandant promoted with a transfer to Berlin

programme.title: Mchale 224
programme.desc: Mchale 224

programme.title: Mchale 333
programme.desc: Mchale 333

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer meets a family from N Carolina who have encountered truck problems en route to Oregon so Gomer puts them up in a blasting range cabin untill he has time to fix their truck

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer volunteers to train a German Shepherd named Killer intended for sentry duty but turns Killer into a pussycat

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan rescues a native woman from drowning which according her custom makes her his slave But soon a fellow tribesman comes to the island and challenges Gilligan for her in a fight to the death

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan rescues a native woman from drowning which according her custom makes her his slave But soon a fellow tribesman comes to the island and challenges Gilligan for her in a fight to the death

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa and Luke attempt to build a rowboat

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: After Amos mocks Georges painting cheap junk dealer Daggett pays twenty dollars for a painting by George at the McCoy farm so Amos encourages Georges painting to be his manager unaware that Daggett has actually paid for the frame

programme.title: Woman Of Straw
programme.desc: Tyrannical but ailing tycoon Charles Richmond becomes very fond of his attractive Italian nurse Maria The nurse in turn falls in love with Charles neer-do-well nephew Anthony who plots ways to gain control of his uncles fortune

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Suzanne doesnt know if boyfriend Alan loves her for her self or her money Mason falls for Alicia but her terrier doesnt like him Isaac falls for Selena who is engaged to someone else

programme.title: WKRP 116
programme.desc: WKRP 116

programme.title: WKRP 212
programme.desc: WKRP 212

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Herman Harlan and Freida accompany Wood and young son Will on a father-son camping trip

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Evan knocks a hole in a spare bedroom and it looks like Abe Lincoln

programme.title: Vegas
programme.desc: While the sheriffs office investigates a murder connected to a divorce ranch an old flame pays a visit to Ralph and Mia tells her dad about her relationship with Jack Meanwhile Vincent discovers that his wife is the rat

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Hart to Hart

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Zoor and Daan travel to a cloister for an energy sharing ceremony but one of the sisters is killed and everyone is a suspect

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A young Morthren rebels against his people so runs away to live amongst humans and ends up becoming friends with Debi

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Rowan who claims that she and Will were married in a previous life before she was burned as a witch finds herself accused of murder Can she find her true self before the angry mob takes the law into their own hands

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When one of Dr Arcanes experiments is inexplicably ruined Graham suspects poltergeists Arcane swiftly discovers the spirit of General Sunderland is haunting the swamp and has plans for revenge

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans find themselves caught up in a long-running war between two rival planets Betha and Delta When a Bethan gunship which has landed on the moon as a tactical advantage appears to have been hit its commander Dione seeks sanctuary with the Alphans Koenig attempts to negotiate a truce but Dione has other ideas

programme.title: Gamera Vs Barugon War Of The Monsters
programme.desc: After a treacherous expedition to retrieve a giant opal disaster strikes as the opal reveals itself to be an egg which spawns Barugon demon dog from Hell! Armed with a deadly tongue and cold beams Barugon wreaks havoc on Japan Gamera comes to save the day

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Old moonshine runners Uncle Jesse and Boss decide to settle who is better once and for all in a race in nearby Hatchapee County However both of them have to beware of Hatchapee County Sheriff Emmitt Loomis while Uncle Jesse should be doubly concerned about Boss scheme to switch water with moonshine

programme.title: Hercules 105
programme.desc: Hercules 105

programme.title: The Streers of San Francisco
programme.desc: The murder of a pregnant girl leads Stone and Keller to arrogant radio host Terry Vine who has a large female fanbase The dead girl claimed to be pregnant with Vines baby giving him a motive for murder and after her blackmailing roommate also turns up dead Keller is convinced Vine is the killer

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The teams latest mission has them trying to root out a network of spies who were brought in by an American photographer The problem is the code that he and his handlers communicate with is unbreakable So they devise a plan to get him to reveal the method of decoding his communications And their plan has him asking for Cinnamon to pose for him During their photo shoot she displays knowledge of bio chemistry which the photographer decides to exploit

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: After being stabbed while rescuing a woman from her attacker Kimble is taken to the nearest infirmary located inside a prison One of the inmates threatens to expose Kimble if he doesnt help in a drug-smuggling operation

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: The return of a Spanish nobleman with a claim to land in the Valley which is already occupied becomes further complicated by a romance between Heath and the noblemans daughter

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne last member of a posse is shot by a trap set by the outlaw Black Jack A sister of woman married to a judge finds him and takes him home at a remote cabin as a winter storm snows them in The judge leads a dual life

programme.desc: Lets Go Thailand The Long Way to Bangkok Ep 016

programme.title: Conquest of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Following a North American pandemic from a space-borne disease that wiped out all dogs and cats in 1983 the government has become a series of Schutzstaffel-patterned police states that took chimpanzees gorillas and orangutans as pets before establishing a culture based on ape slave labor These events were foretold in 1973 as testimony by two chimpanzee scientists who came from the distant future Cornelius and Zira before they were killed Widely believed to be dead their baby was secretly raised by the circus owner Armando as a young horseback rider In 1991 now fully grown and named Caesar the ape is brought to one of the cities to distribute flyers for Armandos circus During their trip Armando advises Caesar not to speak in public for fear of his life

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.title: Fright Night 2
programme.desc: Fright Night Part 2 is a sequel to link=tt0089175] Charley Brewster and the horror host Peter Vincent must face more vampires out for revenge

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Phil Melissa Mitch Mary and Vinnie are high school friends who unwittingly raise the dead on Halloween night Once the dead have returned Pitchford Cove will never be the same againor will it

programme.title: Laser Mission
programme.desc: Action superstar Brandon Lee portrays rebellious government agent Michael Gold who is sent on a desperate mission to a Soviet-controlled African nation in order to uncover a top-secret laser weapons operation and destroy it

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: Chopping Mall
programme.desc: A group of young shopping mall employees stay behind for a late night party in one of the stores When the mall goes on lock-down before they can get out the robot security system malfunctions and goes on a killing spree

programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents

programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Jonas Correia v. Luis Diogo

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Greg Steen v. Elvis Vukaj.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Clay Davidson at HK40

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Chris McMillan as we delve into the life of a coach.

programme.desc: Giant caterpillars appear in the Central American Jungle By clearing a path they reveal a map to the temple of an ancient Malacca civilization

programme.desc: Warrior With a Closed Heart

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Resurrected! Transformation of Rage

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin and Pit are on their way back from Dragons Den when they get ambushed by the Sheriff of Nottinghams soldiers Kevin and Pit join forces with Robin Hood to defeat the Sheriff

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: In Hoopland an inventor is annoyed that he is small so he builds a robot and makes a wish however when the wish goes wrong; Captain N Princess Lana and Larry Bird help him by going into Hoop Mountain and face Clockman

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: When an archaeologist discovers the remains of the fabled continent of Atlantis Cy-Kill takes advantage of the situation by unleashing a host of ancient demons to destroy the Guardians

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Both sides turn to the deranged but brilliant Dr Braxis first to destroy the Roguestar and then to save it

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Lightning League discovers the Liberty Stone on Paxtar and once again they go in search of it hoping that its power will lead them to Audric Gillian alters their body structure so they can withstand the gravity pressure on Paxtar

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian and Flora sense Vantus presence again and Gillian also senses a great deal of power Vantu has captured the magic of the world and put it in a pyramid When he delivers Jayce to Saw Boss the power will be his to use without interference
